title: Cynorkis unguiculata

taxonomy: Cynorkis unguiculata is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Cynorkis unguiculata includes the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Liliopsida, order Asparagales, and family Orchidaceae. Within the family Orchidaceae, it belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Orchideae. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.

intro: Cynorkis unguiculata, also known as the yellow-flowered orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects that may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and skin conditions.
